name: Long Rest
definition: A period of 8+ hours of downtime with specific benefits and restrictions
full_text:
A Long Rest is a period of extended downtime—at least 8 hours—available to any creature. During a Long Rest, you sleep for at least 6 hours and perform no more than 2 hours of light activity, such as reading, talking, eating, or standing watch.

During sleep, you have the Unconscious condition. After you finish a Long Rest, you must wait at least 16 hours before starting another one.

mechanics.light_activity: No more than 2 hours (reading, talking, eating, standing watch)
mechanics.cooldown: Must wait at least 16 hours before another Long Rest

effects.hp_recovery: Regain all lost Hit Points and all spent Hit Point Dice; reduced HP maximum returns to normal
effects.ability_scores: Any reduced ability scores return to normal
effects.exhaustion: Exhaustion level decreases by 1 if applicable

interruptions.physical_exertion: 1+ hour of walking or other exertion stops rest
interruptions.partial_benefit: Resting at least 1 hour before interruption grants Short Rest benefits
interruptions.resuming: Can resume immediately; adds 1 hour per interruption
